templates.text: '{a1}' → '{a2}' → '{a3}'. The connections tighten. The dungeon groans.
Three links — {a1}, {a2}, {a3}. Three locks, opened in sequence. What was behind them is now yours.
{a1}. Then {a2}. Then {a3}. The chain sang. The dungeon heard it.
Four links: {a1}, {a2}, {a3}, {a4}. The chain burns brighter than any torch.
Four answers — {a1}, {a2}, {a3}, {a4} — and the four walls of this room shimmer. Four is the number at which the dungeon begins to pay serious attention.
{a1}, {a2}, {a3}, {a4}. Four links forged in sequence. The chain is now longer than most seekers manage. The dungeon takes notice.
Five truths, forged into a single chain. The walls crack. Something beneath you shifts.
{a1} → {a2} → {a3} → {a4} → {a5}. Five. Unbroken. The deep stirs — it recognizes a chain this long. It does not often see one.
The sound a five-chain makes: not words, not music. Something older. The dungeon uses it to calibrate. You have just recalibrated something in the deep.
Something below felt that. Five consecutive truths resonate at a frequency the lower levels were not prepared to absorb. Prepare for a different kind of encounter.
